---
title: "Charlotte Mary Yonge - Sparks of light for every day"
year: 1881
slug: "sparks_of_light"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


Witt, Madame de (Henriette Elizabeth), 1829-1908

**Sparks of light for every day**

Collected by Madame Guizot De Witt,  
done into English by the translator of "Gold Dust" [i.e. C.M. Yonge].

Edited by Charlotte M. Yonge.

#### A scan of this volume may be available  search in Google Books
